spec_match.rationale: The audit suggestions now follow the current CSS Ruby shape: auto plus constrained spaces, with none described as the legacy spaces alias.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP loaded every built-in example, ran the audit, verified summary counts and issue lists, tested inert script input, and verified Clear resets the panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still matches the feature index promise of checking rp fallback, lang, rt content, annotation length, and overhang suggestions.

edge_cases.rationale: The heuristic now includes inherited lang, inline writing-mode, and annotation script profile instead of choosing only from character length.

references.rationale: The concept page embeds the ChromeStatus feature link and CSS Ruby Layout spec link.

design_system.rationale: A raw-hex scan found no literal hex colors in the feature concept HTML; this page uses shared CSS variables and explicit button colors.

summary: The audit page now links ChromeStatus, uses the corrected spaces/none alias guidance, weights language and writing-mode in its suggestion engine, and has a safe Clear path. Chrome DevTools MCP found no console errors after the fix.
